name: ORION ENERGY SYSTEMS, INC.
summary: Orion Energy Systems, Inc. (OESX) designs and sells LED lighting retrofit solutions and EV charging infrastructure products. The company serves commercial and industrial customers through direct and indirect distribution channels, competing in the lighting upgrade market against foreign and domestic competitors. Orion also acquired Voltrek, expanding into EV charging. Revenue is largely project-based, derived from a limited number of customers in competitive bid processes.
